parameters.query: SELECT j.id, j.title, j.company, j.location, j.salary_raw, j.url, j.tier, j.composite_score, j.job_type, js.reasoning FROM jobs j LEFT JOIN job_scores js ON js.job_id = j.id WHERE tenant_id = '{{ $('Loop Over Tenants').item.json.tenant_id }}' AND j.tier IN ('A', 'B') AND j.discovered_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND j.is_duplicate = false ORDER BY j.composite_score DESC

INSERT INTO notification_log (tenant_id, notification_type, jobs_included, recipient, status) VALUES ('{{ $('Loop Over Tenants').item.json.tenant_id }}', 'daily_digest', {{ $json.total || 0 }}, '{{ $('Loop Over Tenants').item.json.notification_email }}', 'sent')
SELECT id AS tenant_id, name AS tenant_name, notification_email, candidate_profile, search_config, email_config FROM tenants WHERE is_active = true

SELECT j.id, j.title, j.company, j.location, j.salary_raw, j.url, j.tier, j.composite_score, j.job_type, js.reasoning FROM jobs j LEFT JOIN job_scores js ON js.job_id = j.id WHERE j.tier IN ('A', 'B') AND j.discovered_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours' AND j.is_duplicate = false ORDER BY j.composite_score DESC
INSERT INTO notification_log (notification_type, jobs_included, recipient, status) VALUES ('daily_digest', {{ $json.total || 0 }}, 'chellamma.uk@gmail.com', 'sent')
